seo.siteDescription: Mathematics drawn as a map you can walk: a concept atlas, interactive tools, ways of thinking, and puzzle games — from primary school to the foundations of university math.
seo.story: Follow the little prince from planet to planet and meet mathematics inside the story.

home.quote: Ce qui embellit le désert, c'est qu'il cache un puits quelque part…
home.quoteTranslation: What makes the desert beautiful is that somewhere it hides a well…
home.heroAlt: The Little Prince sitting on the moon, watching a rose

common.comingSoon: This space is being prepared. Content is coming soon.
common.notTranslated: This page has no English version yet — the original Chinese text is shown below.
common.unexpectedErrorHint: The error was recorded. Retry now, or come back later if it continues.
common.invalidInput: Invalid input. Please check the form and try again.

notFound.title: This page wandered off
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist, or its address has changed. Head back to the atlas and start from a planet.

changes.title: Recent changes
changes.label: Change notifications, {count} unread
changes.empty: There are no new changes relevant to you.

types.staff_deactivated: A staff member was deactivated and handed over

compliance.privacyIntro: Mathin processes only the data needed for learning, classes and school operations, with role permissions and database row-level security restricting access.
compliance.rightsBody: You may request access, correction, export or deletion. Financial audit records subject to retention duties are retained with restricted use.
compliance.requestSaved: Your request was submitted and will be handled after identity verification.
compliance.requestFailed: Submission failed. Sign in and retry.
compliance.childrenIntro: A guardian should read and consent to these rules before a child under 14 uses Mathin.
compliance.consentBody: Guardian consent is recorded separately for learning traces, class reviews and video, and may be withdrawn where processing is incomplete.
compliance.videoBody: Class videos are private and available only to the student, authorized guardians and responsible teachers through short-lived signed links.

auth.phoneHint: Enter a phone number with country code and we will send a one-time code.
auth.phoneError: The code could not be sent or verified. Check the SMS provider configuration and retry.
auth.error: Something went wrong. Check your email and password.

games.intro: The royal arena: every game is a "reasonable order". Pick a crown and beat the clock.
games.pickDifficulty: Pick a difficulty — you can restart anytime.
games.loginToRank: Sign in so your results count on the leaderboard
games.noRanks: No one has finished this difficulty yet — the throne awaits.

sudoku.name: Sudoku
sudoku.desc: Fill the 9×9 board with 1–9 so no row, column or box repeats.
sudoku.rules: Each row, column and 3×3 box must contain the digits 1–9 exactly once. Tap an empty cell, then enter a digit with the keyboard or the pad below — clashing digits turn red. Start with the cells that have the fewest candidates.

kakuro.name: Kakuro
kakuro.desc: Fill by the clue sums in the black cells: each run uses distinct digits 1–9 that add up exactly.
kakuro.rules: The number at a black cell's top right is the sum of the run to its right; bottom left is the sum of the run below. Digits 1–9, no repeats within a run — broken runs turn red. Start with the smallest or largest sums (a two-cell run of 3 can only be 1+2).

magic-square.name: Magic square
magic-square.desc: Place 1 to n² in the grid so every row, column and diagonal has the same sum.
magic-square.rules: Each number is used exactly once; every row, column and both diagonals must equal the magic sum. Compute it first (total of all numbers ÷ rows), then work from the diagonals and the centre.

magicSquare.target: Every row, column and both diagonals must sum to {sum}

tools.intro: Interactive classroom instruments: open directly, or copy the embed code into your courseware.

fraction-line.name: Fraction number line
fraction-line.desc: Add up unit fractions point by point and compare fraction units on one number line.

motion-lab.name: Motion lab
motion-lab.desc: Characters travel on parallel tracks — meet, chase, and watch the gaps live with the ruler.

fractionLine.zeroHint: Drag any integer tick to pan; double-click to reset

motion.solveHint: The value marked “auto” is computed from the other two; edit it to switch which one is solved
motion.dragHint: Drag a character to move and measure: the drag direction sets the travel direction; distance, time and speed fill in on release
motion.editHint: Click the avatar to upload a photo (long-press to reset); click the vehicle to switch (sets its speed, long-press to reset); click the position number to type a position; ◀ ▶ turns in place

dashboard.noScores: No finished games yet — win a star in the royal arena.
dashboard.noClassrooms: You haven't joined or created a classroom yet.

coursewareStudio.title: Production workbench
coursewareStudio.intro: Work on courseware production, publishing, and adaptation by lecture.
coursewareStudio.workbenchIntro: Work through incomplete, recently edited, and ready-to-publish lectures in one place; browse courses from the product library.
coursewareStudio.taskQueueIntro: Each item is one lecture and aspect track, rather than another course directory.
coursewareStudio.taskSearchPlaceholder: Search product, MFHK code, or lecture name
coursewareStudio.taskQueueEmpty: There are no courseware tasks for this filter.
coursewareStudio.editDenied: You do not have page-edit permission, so this workbench remains in read-only preview mode.
coursewareStudio.workbenchNoPages: This lecture has no courseware pages yet, so the production stage cannot open.
coursewareStudio.workbenchNoReleaseHint: After release, readers of the course product can preview this lecture.
coursewareStudio.keyboardPagingHint: Use arrow keys to change pages
coursewareStudio.adaptQueueIntro: Automatically cropped backgrounds require human approval before they can enter a 4:3 release.
coursewareStudio.adaptManualIntro: Class D pages depend on a 16:9 composition and are never changed automatically; rearrange them page by page in the research editor before release.
coursewareStudio.editorHint: Editing page {page} {title} · drafts never affect a class already in session.
coursewareStudio.selectNode: Select an element on the stage to edit it.
coursewareStudio.invalidJson: Invalid JSON; it has not been saved
coursewareStudio.copySucceeded: The page was copied as a draft in the target lecture
coursewareStudio.trackReplacementHint: Bulk replacement stays within the selected aspect track. Published releases and started sessions remain pinned to the old version.
coursewareStudio.imageReplaced: The image was replaced with a page-only asset
coursewareStudio.assetLibraryIntro: Find shared courseware assets by kind, role, and usage. The first release supports bulk image replacement only; video, audio, SVG, and H5 remain read-only.
coursewareStudio.assetSearchPlaceholder: Name, candidate key, or hash fragment
coursewareStudio.assetLibraryEmpty: No shared assets match these filters.
coursewareStudio.assetDetailIntro: Select the locations that should use the new image, then submit once. Published releases and frozen sessions always retain their original version.
coursewareStudio.assetUsageTreeHint: All locations following the published version are selected by default. Page-specific pinned revisions are never changed in bulk.
coursewareStudio.assetConfirmHint: The image has passed server-side decoding, dimension, and hash validation. One database transaction will apply the replacement and write its audit trail.
coursewareStudio.assetPointerPlan: The shared asset’s published pointer will advance. Its {count} following locations resolve the new image when their lecture is next released.
coursewareStudio.assetBranchPlan: A new shared-asset branch will be created and only the selected {count} locations will be rebound to it.
coursewareStudio.assetImpactSummary: {selected} locations selected, {unselected} unselected; frozen sessions reference these locations {frozen} time(s).
coursewareStudio.assetReleaseIsolation: Current published releases and frozen sessions do not change. Publish a new lecture release where the new asset should take effect.
coursewareStudio.assetUploadHint: PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF up to 50 MB. The file first enters immutable CAS, then you confirm its scope.
coursewareStudio.assetStaged: The new image is ready for confirmation.
coursewareStudio.assetPointerUpdated: The published pointer advanced for {count} locations.
coursewareStudio.assetBranchCreated: A resource branch was created and {count} locations were rebound.
coursewareStudio.assetReplacementHistoryEmpty: This asset has no bulk-replacement history yet.
coursewareStudio.assetRollbackConfirmDescription: Rollback only proceeds while the resource or bindings remain unchanged by a later operation; a conflict writes no partial result.
coursewareStudio.assetRollbackSucceeded: The asset replacement was rolled back.

home.staffIntro: Your day, organized by your role.
home.emptyStaff: This account has no school workspace permissions. Ask an administrator to assign a staff role.
home.refundQueueHint: Refund requests are waiting for approval.

home.activityTodayEmpty: No activities in the next two days.
home.reviewGapsEmpty: All sessions in the last 7 days are reviewed.

operations.title: Error monitor
operations.intro: The latest 200 server request, Server Action, and route errors. Records are read-only and grouped by route, digest, and release for diagnosis.

activities.title: Activities
activities.intro: Manage trials, assessments, workshops, lectures and competitions. Results are added to each student's follow-up timeline.

reviews.title: Session reviews
reviews.failed: Could not save reviews. Please retry.

videos.title: Review session videos

courses.title: Courses
courses.name: Name
courses.intro: Courses, lectures and courseware templates — classes are built from here.
courses.libraryIntro: Browse course products, variants, teaching plans and courseware readiness. Course seasons and operating terms are managed separately.
courses.searchFamilies: Search course products, variant codes or lectures
courses.familyScopeUnavailableTitle: This variant is outside the current view
courses.familyScopeUnavailableHint: Return to the course-product library to choose an available view, or enter from a variant you teach.
courses.useVariantForClass: Build a class with this variant
courses.teachingPlanHint: Browse this variant's lectures, objectives and published-courseware readiness.
courses.teachingPlanEmpty: This variant has no lectures yet.
courses.coursewareNotReleasedHint: This lecture has no current release, so a read-only preview is unavailable.
courses.archivedLectureHidden: {count} archived lectures are collapsed by default.
courses.editingTeachingPlanHint: Save lecture names, objectives and ordering together. Archiving keeps every historical reference.
courses.newLectureHint: The new lecture joins this save as a draft.
courses.staleTeachingPlan: The teaching plan changed elsewhere. Refresh and try again.
courses.archiveLectureImpact: {pageCount} pages, {releaseCount} releases, {classroomCount} classes, {sessionCount} scheduled records and {objectCount} asset objects are retained. Archiving only stops new scheduling.
courses.restoreLectureHint: Restoring returns this lecture to the plan and makes it eligible for new scheduling again.
courses.notFound: The course does not exist or you do not have access.
courses.schoolTermsHint: New records use the current term; activating another term never rewrites history.
courses.newSchoolTermHint: The term is created inactive. Verify dates before activating it.
courses.lectureInUse: This lecture is used by a class session and cannot be deleted.

followups.title: Follow-up board
followups.intro: Push students along the lifecycle: overdue ones first, trial-day students the same day.
followups.duplicateProceedHint: Review the existing profiles first. If this is a different person, click again to continue.
followups.appendOnlyPolicy: Follow-ups are append-only. Add a correction entry instead of editing or deleting history.

followups.emptyGroup: No students in this stage yet.

students.title: Students
students.intro: Student profiles are the school workspace hub: leads, follow-ups, enrollments, learning and fees meet here.
students.name: Name
students.importIntro: Paste CSV or TSV in this fixed order: name, phone, grade, region, source, remark. The header row is optional.
students.importLimit: {count} rows detected; up to 500 per import.
students.importFailed: Import failed. Check the data or your permissions and retry.
students.deletedBanner: This student was moved to the recycle bin on {date}. Historical records are preserved.
students.deleteConfirm: Move this student to the recycle bin? Historical records will be kept.
students.deleteActiveEnrollment: This student still has an active enrollment. Withdraw them before deleting.
students.saveFailed: Could not save. Check the fields or your permissions.
students.notFound: The student does not exist or you do not have access.
students.followUpPlaceholder: Log a follow-up: call summary, class performance, learning notes…
students.guardianInviteHint: The invitation expires in seven days and is single-use. The guardian still confirms learning and video consent separately.
students.mergeKeepsCurrent: The current profile is kept; orders, attendance, follow-ups, and learning records move from the candidate.
students.mergeStudentConfirm: Merge “{name}” into the current profile? The candidate becomes an immutable merge tombstone and this cannot be directly undone.
students.provisionPhoneConfirm: Create a confirmed Supabase Auth account for {phone} and link it to this profile. The student can then sign in with SMS OTP.

students.provisionPhoneAlreadyLinked: This student already has a linked login account.
students.provisionPhoneInvalid: Invalid phone number. Include the country code (e.g. +86).

courseware.templateHint: Template pages apply to every session that references this lecture. Once a class is built, sessions can only insert pages on top of the template — template pages can't be removed or edited from a session.
courseware.empty: No template pages yet. Upload an image or video, or insert a game or board page.
courseware.seedHint: The same seed generates the same puzzle on every device.

overlay.title: This session's courseware ({count} pages)
overlay.hint: Grey pages come from the courseware template and can't be removed or edited. You can insert board/image/video/game pages between template pages, and reorder every page freely. Everything gets frozen into the official courseware when class starts.
overlay.seedHint: The same seed generates the same puzzle on every device.

classBuild.title: New class
classBuild.intro: Building from a course automatically schedules every lecture into a session. You can also build a free class with no course and add sessions manually.
classBuild.courseStepHint: Search by product, variant, product code, or lecture. The full course directory is never preloaded.
classBuild.infoStepHint: Lead teaching and learning support are distinct operational responsibilities; support is not added to classroom members.
classBuild.scheduleStepHint: The operating academic term drives scheduling; it is not a course variant's seasonal value.
classBuild.confirmStepHint: Classes are created in planning by default. Immediate activation is available only after all checks pass.
classBuild.chooseCourse: Search and choose a course variant
classBuild.searchCourses: Search product, variant, code, or lecture
classBuild.coursePickerStart: Enter a keyword or select a filter to start searching.
classBuild.coursePickerEmpty: No course variants match. Adjust the keyword or filters.
classBuild.coursePickerFailed: Course search is temporarily unavailable. Try again.
classBuild.overridesCleared: The course variant changed, so per-lecture schedule adjustments were cleared.
classBuild.purposeChanged: The class purpose changed. Choose a course variant for that purpose again.
classBuild.initialCourseUnavailable: The course variant in this link is not currently available for class creation. Search again to choose one.
classBuild.freeClassHint: A free class is not attached to a course variant and creates no sessions automatically; schedule them after creation.
classBuild.freeScheduleHint: A free class creates no sessions automatically, but still needs an operating academic term for attribution.
classBuild.productionPlanningOnly: This production course is not fully prepared, so the class can only be created in planning.
classBuild.testActivationWarning: A test class can be activated with incomplete courseware. Confirm that this is isolated test work.
classBuild.activateNowUnavailable: Immediate activation needs course readiness and no lead-teacher scheduling conflicts.
classBuild.name: Class name
classBuild.submitFailed: Failed to create, check the form and try again.

classes.title: Classes
classes.intro: A class is a classroom with a course and schedule attached. Manage the roster and session times here; actual teaching happens in the classroom page.
classes.name: Class name
classes.coursewareTrackDescription: 16:9 and 4:3 coexist. The class default applies to unstarted sessions, each lecture can override it, and the version freezes when class starts.
classes.substituteDescription: This overrides only this session. Clear the selection to use the class teacher again. The change is audited.
classes.sessionChangeDescription: Leave updates attendance and lesson consumption by policy. Makeup scheduling remains separate from billing.
classes.consumeRuleDescription: Each value is the lesson amount deducted for that attendance state. Attendance edits reverse the old ledger entry before applying the new state.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.intro: This week's sessions at a glance.
schedule.schoolTermsHint: Operating terms drive scheduling and operational attribution; they never replace a course variant's seasonal value.
schedule.name: Name

finance.title: Finance
finance.intro: Orders, payments, refunds, coupons, scholarships and student accounts.
finance.appendOnlyPolicy: Finance records are append-only. Correct errors with reversals, voids, or negative ledger entries.
finance.searchOrder: Search by student or order no.

staff.title: Staff
staff.intro: Review staff members and their roles, assign roles to existing accounts, or promote a customer account to staff.
staff.deactivateHint: Assigned students and future substitutions move to the replacement; historical creator records stay intact.
staff.err_INVALID_REPLACEMENT: The replacement is not an active staff member.
staff.err_LAST_ACTIVE_ADMIN: The last active administrator cannot be deactivated.
staff.addStaffHint: Look up an account by exact email. Student / parent accounts must be promoted to staff by an admin before roles can be assigned.
staff.noAccount: No account found for that email.
staff.err_FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to do that.
staff.err_CANNOT_GRANT_SELF: You cannot change your own roles.
staff.err_CANNOT_REVOKE_SELF: You cannot change your own roles.
staff.err_CANNOT_CHANGE_SELF: You cannot change your own identity.
staff.err_TARGET_NOT_STAFF: The target is not a staff member yet. Promote them first.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.intro: Manage staff roles on the left; tick the permissions each role holds on the right. Changes apply immediately after saving.
roles.configureAdminOnly: Only system admins can grant this
roles.err_FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to do that.
roles.err_ROLE_HAS_MEMBERS: This role still has members. Remove them on the Staff page first.
roles.err_INVALID_PERMISSION_KEYS: Invalid permission keys. Refresh the page and retry.

tools.clearConfirm: Clear the whole board? You can still undo this once.

list.intro: Teachers open classrooms; students join with an invite code to learn and submit work together.
list.joinFailed: Invalid invite code. Please check with your teacher.
list.empty: No classrooms yet. Teachers can create one; students, ask your teacher for an invite code.

home.inviteHint: Students enter this code on the classroom page to join.

prep.title: Pre-class checklist
prep.assetsFailed: {count} pages failed to download. Check the network and re-enter this page.
prep.h5Online: This lesson has {count} interactive page(s) that require staying online
prep.h5OnlineHint: Interactive packages cannot be preloaded offline; loading has been pre-warmed. If the network drops, interactive pages become unavailable while other pages keep working.
prep.localHint: Open the display window and drag it to the big screen; class continues even offline.
prep.p2pWaiting: Waiting to pair a LAN device
prep.p2pUnsupported: This browser does not support LAN peer connections

p2pFailure.no-signal: No other classroom device was discovered
p2pFailure.no-candidate: The browser did not expose a usable network address
p2pFailure.ice-failed: The device was discovered, but the LAN connection failed

prep.p2pFailureHint: Candidate types: {candidates}. Disable VPN/proxy on the phone and confirm both devices use the same non-guest Wi-Fi without AP isolation; otherwise use a mobile hotspot.
prep.p2pOfflineReady: The internet can now be disconnected; pages, stars, and boards continue over the same Wi-Fi/hotspot.
prep.p2pHint: Connect the tablet and computer to the same Wi-Fi/mobile hotspot, then open this lesson on the other device. If pairing never completes, AP isolation may be enabled; use a mobile hotspot or same-device dual windows.
prep.serverHint: Class works offline; remote students need this channel.
prep.wakeMissing: Cannot keep the screen awake automatically — disable auto-lock in system settings.
prep.noReloadWarning: Do not refresh or close this page during class — it cannot recover while offline.
prep.startFailed: Failed to start class, check your connection and try again.
prep.waiting: Waiting for the teacher to start…

live.pendingHint: Events recorded while offline; they upload automatically once back online.
live.noPages: This lesson has no pages yet.
live.assetMissing: This page is not preloaded. Go back to the checklist to preload.
live.docNotReady: This courseware page is not ready yet (preloading, or the lecture is unpublished).
live.endConfirm: End this class? It becomes read-only afterwards.
live.rehearsalHint: Page turns, boards and stars in rehearsal stay in this window only — nothing is recorded or synced.

assignments.deleteConfirm: Delete "{title}"? Student submissions will be deleted too.
assignments.resubmitHint: You can resubmit to overwrite your previous answer.

report.title: Class report
report.noStudents: No students in this classroom yet.
report.noQuiz: No questions were asked in this class.

terms.intro: A learning line of mathematical definitions from primary school onward. The geographer records only eternal things.
terms.fromTo: Where it comes from · where it goes
terms.galaxyHint: Every star is a concept; the golden ones are those you have studied in depth. Hover to see what a star is, click to visit it.

termsUniverse.hint: Click a planet to explore its mathematics
termsUniverse.empty: This island is still wrapped in mist, waiting to be settled…
termsUniverse.graphIntro: A panoramic relation view for teachers and heavy explorers — planets and islands are the learning entrances.

number.name: Number & Quantity
number.tag: Where numbers are born, written and compared.

operations.name: Operations & Algorithms
operations.tag: The workshop of add, subtract, multiply, divide.

geometry.name: Geometry & Space
geometry.tag: A crystal world of shapes, measure and motion.

algebra.name: Algebra & Relations
algebra.tag: From concrete numbers to abstract relations.

functions.name: Functions & Change
functions.tag: The clock town of coordinates and change.

data.name: Data & Chance
data.tag: A lakeside observatory of statistics and randomness.

logic.name: Logic & Proof
logic.tag: The lighthouse coast of propositions and proof.

birth.name: Isle of Counting
birth.desc: Counting, natural numbers, zero and the number line.

notation.name: Tower of Place Value
notation.desc: Base ten, place value and big numbers.

factors.name: Mine of Factors
factors.desc: Factors, multiples, primes, odd and even.

rules.name: Isle of Rules
rules.desc: Order of operations, brackets and laws.

shapes.name: Garden of Shapes
shapes.desc: Solid and plane figures, triangles, quadrilaterals, circles.

lines.name: Valley of Lines & Angles
lines.desc: Segments, rays, lines, angles, perpendicular and parallel.

measure.name: Valley of Measure
measure.desc: Length, perimeter, area, volume and units.

lighthouse.name: Lighthouse of Statistics
lighthouse.desc: The mean and what represents data.

language.name: Isle of Notation & Rigor
language.desc: Symbols and precise mathematical language, further ahead.

mindsSection.intro: Each way of thinking you grasp lights another lamp.
